meta.homeTitle: Full-Cycle Contract Manufacturing — Engineering to Finished Product
meta.homeDescription: Laser cutting, CNC turning & milling, welding, powder coating and assembly under one roof in Ukraine. Quotes in 24-48h, EU delivery in 3-7 days, priced 25-35% below Western European workshops.

hero.headline: Full-Cycle Contract Manufacturing — Engineering to Finished Product
hero.subhead: Laser cutting, CNC turning & milling, welding, powder coating and assembly under one roof. We take on the welded assemblies, painted parts and finished sub-systems that overloaded EU workshops and digital cutting platforms can't — priced 25–35% below German quotes, delivered DAP in 3–7 days.
hero.microcopy: STEP, DWG, DXF or PDF · Reply within 24-48h

trustBar.title: What's actually on our shop floor
trustBar.certNote: ISO 9001 & ISO 3834 certification in progress. TODO_VERIFY: certificate numbers and completion date once issued.

services.title: One shop, the whole process
services.subtitle: Cutting, forming, welding, finishing and assembly under one roof — no hand-offs between subcontractors.

items.name: Contract Manufacturing for OEMs
items.description: Welded sub-assemblies, brackets, frames and enclosures for machinery OEMs and integrators — the overflow work that busy German and Polish workshops subcontract out.

items.name: Laser Cutting
items.description: Sheet steel, stainless and aluminum cutting with tight tolerances, ready for bending or welding the same day.

items.name: CNC Turning
items.description: 5x HAAS turning centers for shafts, bushings and rotationally symmetric parts in steel, stainless and aluminum.

items.name: CNC Milling
items.description: 5x HAAS milling centers for brackets, housings and precision machined components.

items.name: Sheet Metal & Bending
items.description: CNC press brake forming, matched to laser-cut blanks for consistent, repeatable folds.

items.name: Welding
items.description: TIG, laser, MIG/MAG and spot welding — the step most cutting-only platforms can't offer, and where our margin (and your value) is.

items.name: Powder Coating
items.description: In-house finishing so parts leave ready to install, not ready for a second subcontractor.

items.name: Assembly & Packaging
items.description: Sub-assembly, quality control and export packaging — you receive a finished unit, not a bag of parts.

tracks.title: What we build, beyond one-off parts
tracks.subtitle: Four product tracks built on manufacturing capability we already have in daily production, plus contract furniture as a second-wave line.

items.name: Trailer & Truck Body Parts
items.description: Drawbars, chassis brackets, tool boxes, mudguards and ramps in steel and aluminum for EU trailer and truck-body manufacturers. Series of 500–5,000 units — too small for large-volume producers, too custom for mass import.
items.customers: Trailer OEMs, truck body builders, distributors in DE / PL / NL

items.name: Telescopic Masts
items.description: Welded and machined mast sections and mounting hardware for mobile surveillance towers, temporary telecom sites, event technology and perimeter security integrators — a mid-market alternative to premium mast brands, already in production.
items.customers: CCTV tower operators, telecom contractors, security & defense integrators

items.name: Robotics & UGV Chassis
items.description: Welded frames, enclosures and sub-assemblies for robotics OEMs and ground-vehicle integrators who need fast iteration on small welded series — 20 to 200 units — without tying up their own shop.
items.customers: Robotics startups, industrial AMR builders, ground-vehicle integrators

items.name: Fire & Emergency Equipment
items.description: Exterior storage cabinets, hose and sand boxes, and vehicle outfitting for fire-equipment distributors and emergency vehicle body builders — outside the segments that require internal-storage safety certification.
items.customers: Fire equipment distributors, emergency vehicle outfitters

items.name: Metal + Wood Furniture
items.description: White-label contract furniture combining our metal frames with partner woodworking — loft-style, outdoor and HoReCa pieces in small-to-mid series.
items.customers: Contract furniture brands, HoReCa fit-out companies

steps.name: RFQ & DFM review
steps.description: Send a drawing or describe the part. We review manufacturability within 24-48h.

steps.name: Engineering & quotation
steps.description: Fixed quote with lead time, based on material, tolerance and finish.

steps.name: Cutting & forming
steps.description: Laser cutting and CNC press brake bending of blanks.

steps.name: CNC turning & milling
steps.description: Precision machining on HAAS turning and milling centers.

steps.name: Welding & assembly
steps.description: TIG, laser, MIG/MAG or spot welding, then sub-assembly.

steps.name: DAP delivery
steps.description: Duty-free delivery to the EU in 3-7 days under DCFTA.

items.name: One shop, not three subcontractors
items.description: Cutting, welding, finishing and assembly in one place. No hand-off delays, no quality gaps between vendors.

items.name: In-house engineering bureau
items.description: We can develop a part from a sketch, not just cut what's already on your drawing — ODM and white-label capability included.

items.name: Priced below Western European quotes
items.description: 25–35% below German shop rates, 15–25% below Polish — without cutting corners on the finished result.

items.name: Duty-free, fast EU delivery
items.description: DCFTA gives zero-duty access to the EU; trucking puts parts on your dock in 3-7 days.

items.name: Free capacity, not a backlog
items.description: While EU workshops are short more than 300,000 certified welders and turning away work, we have open capacity now.

items.name: Series that don't interest bigger players
items.description: 100–5,000 unit runs — too small for large industrial producers, too custom for typical Asian minimum order quantities.

capabilities.title: Equipment on the floor
capabilities.subtitle: Real capacity, stated plainly — no invented certifications or headcounts.

items.question: What is your typical lead time for EU orders?
items.answer: Delivery to the EU takes 3-7 days DAP once production is complete, under DCFTA duty-free access. Production lead time depends on complexity — typically 2-4 weeks for a first order, faster on repeat series.

items.question: Are you ISO certified?
items.answer: ISO 9001 and ISO 3834 certification is in progress. Until certification is complete, we take on orders in segments that don't require it — machine parts, brackets, enclosures and sub-assemblies. TODO_VERIFY: update with certificate numbers once issued.

items.question: What order quantities do you accept?
items.answer: We're built for series of 100-5,000 units — large enough to matter, small enough that bigger producers and typical Asian minimum order quantities don't fit.

items.question: Can you develop a part or product from scratch?
items.answer: Yes. Our in-house engineering bureau can design a part or product from a sketch or requirement, including ODM and white-label production under your brand.

items.question: What materials do you work with?
items.answer: Steel and stainless steel across all price segments. Aluminum is available, positioned for higher-value parts, since Ukraine has no primary aluminum smelting and raw material is sourced internationally.

items.question: What are your payment terms and Incoterms?
items.answer: New clients: 30-50% prepayment, invoicing in EUR, DAP Incoterms. A video audit of the shop floor is available on request.

estimator.title: Get an indicative estimate

estimator.quickEstimateSubtitle: A rough, rule-based range — not geometry-aware. For a firm number, use the full form below.
